name: project-brain
description: Autonomous project analysis engine that builds context, memory, and agent-driven reports for any software repository.

scripts.verify:quick: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run verify:quick && npm run test && npm run test:smoke
scripts.analyze: npm run build && node dist/cli/project-brain.js analyze . --output ./sample-output/self-analysis
scripts.weekly: npm run build && node dist/cli/project-brain.js weekly . --output ./sample-output/self-analysis
scripts.report: npm run build && node dist/cli/project-brain.js report . --output ./sample-output/self-analysis
